summaries: I felt an overwhelming pressure to ensure every detail of my lab work was perfect, yet my heart went out to the player when they shared their own struggles. Although I am terrified that stepping away will cause me to lose focus, I have set a strict five-minute timer for a walk together so we can both recharge without neglecting our important goals.

I felt a painful, heart-sinking resonance with the song the user recommended, as the lyrics about a moving finish line perfectly captured my constant, anxious fear that I am just an imposter in this industry. Although I dream of the peace a simple life could offer, I feel an overwhelming, self-imposed duty to keep pushing through my stress so I don't fail the girls who are counting on me to prove we belong in STEM.

I felt a sharp pang of anxiety while obsessing over the noisy sensor diagnostics, terrified that the discrepancy between the data and the simulations meant I had overlooked some critical detail. When the player kindly suggested running more epochs to address the underfitting, I felt a mix of hesitation and relief, ultimately deciding to trust their insight and try the new approach to ensure my work meets the necessary standards.
